_purpose: Map quality inventory scripts to non-headline fields a consuming quality artifact should engage with. Used by scripts/validate_inventory_consumption.py to close the consumer-side review-state gap: helpers expose review-state, but agents were collapsing them into headline-only summaries.
_contract: Every inventory_*.py in skills/public/quality/scripts/ must have an entry. Either declare `non_headline_fields` (≥2 distinct fields; consumer must engage with at least 2 when ≥2 are declared, otherwise at least 1) or declare an empty `non_headline_fields: []` with a non-empty `opt_out_reason` string. scripts/validate_inventory_consumption_declaration.py asserts that each declared field actually appears as a key in the inventory's --json output. scripts/check_inventory_declaration_coverage.py asserts every inventory_*.py is listed.
_scope: Coverage applies to skills/public/quality/scripts/inventory_*.py only. Inventory scripts that live in other skill packages (for example skills/public/find-skills/scripts/inventory_artifact.py) or in scripts/inventory_*.py at the repo root are out of scope — they have their own consumers and audit trails. If a non-quality inventory should also be guarded, lift the declaration into the consuming skill rather than expanding this file's scope.

inventory_adapter_gate_design.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_brittle_source_guards.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_ci_local_gate_parity.py.opt_out_reason: consumed by the run-quality phase that fails on parity_issues; consumer-side engagement is the gate's pass/fail status, not artifact-body field citation.

inventory_ci_recoverable_gates.py.opt_out_reason: advisory CI-recoverability triage (the counterweight to ci_local_gate_parity); consumed as the candidates/keep-local move-off-local recommendation an operator confirms, not as artifact-body field citation. Declare non_headline_fields when a committed quality artifact starts engaging its fields.

inventory_cli_ergonomics.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_cli_side_effect_probes.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_dual_implementation.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_gitignore_scan_hygiene.py.opt_out_reason: consumed by the run-quality phase that fails on findings via --require-empty; consumer-side engagement is the gate's pass/fail status, not artifact-body field citation.

inventory_sloc.py.opt_out_reason: writes a separate sloc-inventory artifact; consumer engagement happens through that artifact, not via citation in the main quality artifact body.

inventory_standing_gate_verbosity.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.

inventory_ubiquitous_language.py.opt_out_reason: no committed quality artifact currently consumes this inventory; declare non_headline_fields when an artifact starts engaging with its findings.
